messages.content: starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Dragon Valley (Artanis And Lilac) part 1 (The events of this story take place after the campaigns of Legacy of the Void)

Artanis looked down at the planet below him. It was a strange world, unlike anything he had ever seen. But he could sense something powerful here, something that could be of great help to the Protoss.

He turned to Lilac, who was standing next to him. "Are you ready?" he asked.

Lilac nodded. "Yeah, let's do this."

The two of them stepped off their ship and onto the planet below. As they walked through the thick forest, they encountered strange creatures that seemed more plant than animal. But they were no match for Artanis and Lilac, who cut through them with ease.

They soon reached a clearing, where they found a group of Freedom Planet characters waiting for them. They introduced themselves as Sash Lilac, Carol Tea and Milla Basset.

"What brings you to our planet?" Sash Lilac asked.

"We sensed a powerful energy here, one that we believe can help us in our fight against the Zerg," Artanis explained.

"We might be able to help with that," Carol said. "We've been fighting against an evil warlord named Brevon, who has been using the planet's energy to build powerful weapons. If we can stop him, we can free the planet and its energy could be useful to you."

"Then we will work together," Artanis said. "Lead us to Brevon."

The group set out towards Brevon's stronghold. Along the way, they encountered more of his minions, including robotic versions of the creatures they had defeated earlier. But nothing could stop the combined might of the Protoss and the Freedom Planet heroes.

Finally, they reached Brevon's fortress. The evil warlord was waiting for them, surrounded by his guards and powerful weapons. But Artanis and Lilac were undaunted. With the help of the Freedom Planet heroes, they fought their way through the defenses and confronted Brevon himself.

The battle was fierce, but in the end, Artanis and Lilac emerged victorious. Brevon was defeated, his weapons destroyed, and the planet's energy was once again free for all to use.

"Thank you for your help," Artanis said to the Freedom Planet heroes. "We could not have done it without you."

"It was our pleasure," Sash Lilac said. "And maybe, someday, we can help you in your fight against the Zerg."

Artanis nodded. "I believe we will see each other again."

And with that, the Protoss and the Freedom Planet heroes parted ways, each with a newfound respect for the other's abilities.

starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Relic Maze & Fortune Night (Artanis And Lilac) part 2 (The events of this story take place after the campaigns of Legacy of the Void)

As Artanis and Lilac left the planet where they had defeated Brevon, they received a distress call from another nearby world. The distress signal was coming from a planet called Avalice and the two heroes immediately headed towards it.

Upon arriving on the planet, Artanis and Lilac found themselves in the middle of a conflict between the inhabitants of Avalice and an evil alien force known as the Warlords. The Warlords were seeking to steal a powerful artifact known as the Kingdom Stone, which the people of Avalice had been guarding for generations.

Artanis and Lilac quickly offered to help the people of Avalice and set out to stop the Warlords from stealing the Kingdom Stone. They soon found themselves in the middle of a dark and labyrinthine maze, filled with ancient relics and traps.

Despite the danger, Artanis and Lilac pushed forward, using their skills and powers to defeat the creatures that guarded the maze. They eventually found the Kingdom Stone, and with it, they were able to defeat the Warlords and save Avalice.

With the conflict over, the people of Avalice were grateful to Artanis and Lilac for their help. They invited the Protoss and Freedom Planet heroes to a celebration called Fortune Night, where they could relax and enjoy the festivities.

Artanis and Lilac were hesitant at first, not wanting to let their guard down in case of any potential threats. But after learning that Fortune Night was a time of peace and celebration, they decided to join in.

The celebration was unlike anything they had ever experienced before. The people of Avalice danced, sang, and gave thanks for their safety and the heroes who had saved them. Artanis and Lilac found themselves enjoying the revelries, and even joined in on the festivities, dancing and laughing alongside the people of Avalice.

As the night wore on, Artanis and Lilac took a moment to reflect on their journey and the bond they had forged together. They knew that there would always be new dangers and threats to face, but for now, they were content to celebrate a victory and enjoy the peace that had been won.

And so, as the night drew to a close, Artanis and Lilac bid farewell to the people of Avalice and set off into the stars, ready for whatever lay ahead.
starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Sky Battalion (Artanis And Lilac) part 3

As Artanis and Lilac journeyed through space, they were suddenly attacked by a swarm of enemy ships. The two fighters tried to fight them off, but were soon outnumbered and outgunned.

Just as all hope seemed lost, they were saved by a squadron of Freedom Planet fighters who swooped in to assist them. The pilots introduced themselves as Neera Li, Spade, and Torque.

Artanis and Lilac were grateful to the Freedom Planet pilots for their help and decided to join forces. Together, they set out to stop the enemy fleet from causing any further harm.

Their journey led them to a massive floating fortress known as the Sky Battalion. The fortress was heavily guarded and the combined forces of Artanis and the Freedom Planet pilots had to fight their way through hordes of enemy ships and turrets to reach it.

Once they reached the Sky Battalion, they discovered that it was being used to transport a dangerous experimental weapon. The villainous force known as the Galactic Empire was behind the weapon’s creation and they were planning to use it to destroy several planets in a neighboring star system.

Artanis and the Freedom Planet heroes knew they had to stop the weapon from being deployed. They fought their way through the Sky Battalion, facing off against powerful bosses and enemy soldiers at every turn.

Finally, they reached the weapon’s control center, where they found the weapon’s lead engineer, a man by the name of Doctor Kepler. The doctor had planned to activate the weapon, but he was stopped by the combined might of Artanis and the Freedom Planet heroes.

With the weapon destroyed and the Sky Battalion invaded, Artanis and Lilac were once again ready to face whatever new threats lay ahead. They said their goodbyes to Neera Li, Spade, and Torque, grateful for the help they had received.

As Artanis and Lilac continued their journey, they knew that they could count on their new friends from Freedom Planet to help them whenever needed. Together, they would continue to protect the galaxy from all manner of threats that tried to destroy its peace.
starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Jade Creek (Artanis And Lilac) part 4

After their triumph over the Sky Battalion, Artanis and Lilac received a new mission: to investigate a strange energy signal coming from a planet known as Dragon Valley. Upon arrival, they were once again joined by the Freedom Planet trio of Sash Lilac, Carol Tea, and Milla Basset.

Together, the group ventured deep into the dense jungle surrounding Dragon Valley. They encountered many strange and powerful creatures, but with their combined skills, they overcame every challenge with ease.

Eventually, they came across a serene waterway known as Jade Creek. However, their peaceful journey was cut short when they were attacked by a group of the local reptilian inhabitants known as the Serpentine.

Initially, the group was overwhelmed by the Serpentine's sheer numbers and strength. However, Artanis suggested a plan: to sneak into the Serpentine’s stronghold and disable their communications to prevent further reinforcements.

With Artanis taking point, the group stealthily made their way towards the stronghold. They snuck past traps and patrols, ambushing guards and disabling alarms as they went. Finally, they reached the communications tower and succeeded in taking it down.

With no further reinforcements available, Artanis and the Freedom Planet heroes battled their way through to the heart of the Serpentine’s base. There they discovered that the Serpentine had been working with the Zerg, using their DNA to create new, more powerful creatures to assist them in their conquest.

Artanis and the Freedom Planet heroes launched a fierce assault, taking out Zerg hybrids alongside their Serpentine counterparts. After a long and bloody battle, they emerged victorious, having destroyed the Zerg hybrids and freed the Serpentine from their control.

As they left Jade Creek, Artanis and Lilac reflected on their journey together and how much they had accomplished, all because of the power of unity and teamwork. They knew that with the Realm of Protoss and Freedom Planet working together, the galaxy was one step closer to peace.
starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Thermal Base (Artanis And Lilac) part 5

As Artanis and Lilac continued their journey, they received an urgent transmission from a nearby planet, requesting their help. The planet, known as Brevon's old stronghold, was under attack by a powerful rogue force who had gained control of the base.

Artanis and Lilac quickly headed towards the planet and upon arrival, they found the situation to be dire. The base was located on a volcanic world and was surrounded by scorching molten lava. The terrain was dangerous, and the enemy forces were well equipped and numerous.

With the help of their Freedom Planet allies, Artanis and Lilac fought their way through the enemy ranks and eventually made their way to the Thermal Base. Their mission was to take control of the base and stop the rogue force from using it as a weapon against the galaxy.

The base was well guarded, but Artanis and Lilac were not deterred. They made their way through the hot and fiery corridors, engaging in fierce battles with enemy soldiers and robotic guardians.

As they delved deeper into the base, they discovered something unsettling. The rogue force had been experimenting on inanimate objects, in an attempt to infuse them with a powerful source of energy that could be used for their own purposes.

Artanis and Lilac knew that they had to stop the rogue force and put an end to their sinister experiments. With their combined skills and expertise, they extracted the energy and put an end to the rogue force's plans.

With the crisis averted, Artanis and Lilac were once again called to action elsewhere in the galaxy. They left the Thermal Base behind, but not before expressing their gratitude to their Freedom Planet allies for their help.

As they departed, they felt confident and ready for whatever the galaxy would throw their way, knowing that together they were an unstoppable force for good.
starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Pangu Lagoon (Artanis And Lilac) part 6

After their successful mission at Thermal Base, Artanis and Lilac received a message from a group of aquatic creatures on a nearby planet. The creatures, known as the Mer-Kin, requested Artanis and Lilac’s assistance in preventing the Galactic Empire from stealing their ancient artifact, the Scepter.

The Scepter was a powerful weapon that had been protected by the Mer-Kin for centuries. However, the Galactic Empire had discovered its location and was determined to obtain it for their own purposes.

Artanis and Lilac immediately headed towards Pangu Lagoon to help the Mer-Kin. Alongside their Freedom Planet allies, they ventured deep into the aquatic world and defended the Mer-Kin from the Empire's onslaught.

The Empire’s forces were fierce, consisting of both robotic minions and highly trained soldiers. But Artanis and Lilac were not deterred, using their combined strength and strategy to fight their way through the waves of enemies.

Finally, the group reached the Scepter’s location, only to find the Empire heavily defending it. Despite the odds, Artanis and Lilac were determined to claim the Scepter for the Mer-Kin.

The battle was intense. The Empire's forces were relentless, throwing everything they had at the group. But Artanis and Lilac refused to back down, using every skill and tactic at their disposal.

Their efforts paid off when they finally succeeded in obtaining the Scepter. The Mer-Kin thanked Artanis and Lilac for their bravery and assistance, and the group departed Pangu Lagoon with the Scepter safely in their possession.

As they left the planet, Artanis and Lilac reflected on the importance of safeguarding valuable artifacts and the power that comes with unity and teamwork. They knew that together, they would always succeed in protecting the galaxy from dangerous forces and maintaining peace.
starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: 	Battle Glacier (Artanis And Lilac) part 7

As Artanis and Lilac continued their travels, they received an urgent call for help from a planet on the fringes of the galaxy. The planet, known as Battle Glacier, was being threatened by a rogue group of hackers who had taken control of their defense systems and were using them to attack the planet's inhabitants.

Artanis and Lilac headed towards the planet with their Freedom Planet allies, determined to put an end to the hackers' reign of terror. They soon found themselves on a frozen tundra, with enemy forces attacking them at every turn.

Using their agility and their knowledge of the terrain, Lilac and the Freedom Planet heroes were able to navigate the icy landscape with ease. Meanwhile, Artanis and his Protoss warriors used their advanced technology and psionic powers to defend against the enemy's attacks.

As they reached the heart of the planet, they discovered the rogue hackers had installed a powerful device at the base of a mountain. The device was draining the planet's resources to power up a massive weapon that could destroy the entire galaxy.

Artanis and Lilac knew that they had to stop the hackers and destroy their weapon before it was too late. With quick thinking and careful planning, they made their way to the device and took control of it, disabling it before the weapon could fire.

With the threat neutralized, Artanis and Lilac received the gratitude of the Battle Glacier's inhabitants. They knew that their partnership had been crucial in saving the planet and preventing a new tragedy.

As they left the planet, Artanis and Lilac felt a sense of satisfaction in knowing that their actions had prevented an even greater catastrophe. They were eager to continue their travels, ready to face whatever new challenges lay ahead, knowing that they would face them together with the power of unity and teamwork.
starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Final Dreadnought Round/part 1 (Artanis And Lilac) part Final

Artanis and Lilac had conquered many challenges together on their incredible journey. But they soon realized that their greatest challenge had yet to come.

The intergalactic forces of evil had united to build a massive superweapon known as the Final Dreadnought. The Final Dreadnought was an immense fleet capable of destroying entire planets with ease.

Artanis and Lilac knew that they had to stop this menace before it was too late. They reached out to their allies from Freedom Planet and Protoss, as well as other forces from around the galaxy who had stood with them in the past, to form a united front against the Final Dreadnought.

The group prepared for the inevitable assault, knowing that defeat was not an option. They launched a coordinated attack on the weaponry of the Final Dreadnought, aiming to disable it before it could do any harm.

The battle was fierce, and the Final Dreadnought's defenses were adept at repelling attacks. But Artanis, Lilac, and their allies pushed forward, determined to succeed against overwhelming odds.

As the battle raged on, Artanis and Lilac found themselves leading the charge. They fought through countless hordes of enemies, using their powers and skills to stay one step ahead of the enemy.

Their determination paid off in the end. The group was able to disable the Final Dreadnought's weapon systems, ensuring that it could no longer spread fear and destruction across galaxies.

With the Final Dreadnought's fall, Artanis, Lilac, and their allies were hailed as heroes. They had battled through countless odds and overcome impossible challenges together, forming an unbreakable bond of unity and trust.

As they celebrated their victory, Artanis and Lilac knew that their fight was not yet over. There would always be new trials and tribulations to face in the ever-changing galaxy. But they were ready to face those challenges, knowing that they could accomplish anything as long as they had each other and their allegiance to the cause of peace and prosperity.

And so, as the sun set on the Final Dreadnought's demise, Artanis and Lilac looked towards the horizon, ready for the new adventures that awaited them, knowing that they would face them as a powerful team, united in their mission to safeguard the galaxy.
starcraft and Freedom planet crossover: Freedom planet walkthrough: Final Dreadnought Round/part 2 (Artanis And Lilac) part Final

As the dust settled from the battle against the Final Dreadnought, Artanis and Lilac were hailed as heroes. Their allies from around the galaxy celebrated their victory, grateful for the peace and safety that had been preserved.

But Artanis and Lilac knew that their work was not yet done. As they watched the celebrations unfold, they also knew that they could not rest on their laurels.

There were still those who sought to destroy the fragile peace they had fought so hard to establish. There were still enemies lurking in the shadows, waiting for the opportune moment to strike.

Artanis and Lilac vowed to continue their quest for justice and freedom, and they knew that they could rely on their allies to stand by their side. Together, they would defend the galaxy against all who threatened it.

As they prepared to depart from the celebratory gathering, Artanis and Lilac exchanged a knowing glance. They had come a long way since their first meeting, and they had overcome countless challenges together. They had forged a team that was stronger than anything their enemies could throw at them.

And with that, Artanis and Lilac set off towards the horizon, their Prides and their Protoss ships flying side by side. They knew that there would always be a new challenge waiting for them, but with their allies at their side, they also knew that they could tackle anything that came their way.
